title: Provision documentation advisor (template=knowledge-advisor)
justification: Project identity is documentation and prompt library; benefits from dedicated writing and content quality review
perceive: Provision a new 'documentation' advisor for this spoke. Ozi team-coverage eval identified this as the highest-priority gap. Justification: Project identity is documentation and prompt library; benefits from dedicated writing and content quality review Hub templates: /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/. Roster: WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json. Pattern to follow: WAI-Spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.
execute: 1. Read /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/knowledge-advisor/charter.md. This is the template you will adapt.
2. Set advisor_id='documentation' (use the domain name exactly — do not reuse or rename existing advisor entries).
3. Create directory WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/ if it does not exist.

4. Write WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/context_prompt.md — adapt the knowledge-advisor charter: set advisor_id=documentation, domain=documentation, mission statement (2 sentences), responsibilities (3-5 bullet points specific to this spoke), escalation-to-Ozi rule. Do NOT copy boilerplate verbatim — tailor to this spoke's goals.
5. STOP AND VERIFY: confirm WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/context_prompt.md now exists and is non-empty. If it does not exist, stop — do not proceed.

7. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json: add entry advisor_id=documentation, status=stub, department_id=knowledge, domain=documentation, initialized_from_template=knowledge-advisor. If entry exists, update it. Preserve all other entries.

8. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json: if advisor_id absent, append {"advisor_id": "documentation", "run_cadence": "weekly", "event_triggers": [], "last_run_at": null, "next_recommended_run": null}.
9. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/ozi/scan_state.json: in team_coverage.gaps_detected, set the entry with domain=documentation to proposal_status=provisioned. If team_coverage key is absent, create it.
verify: WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/context_prompt.md exists and is non-empty; WAI-Spoke/advisors/documentation/scan_state.json exists with status=stub; registry.json has entry advisor_id=documentation status=stub; schedule-index.json has weekly entry for documentation; ozi/scan_state.json team_coverage.gaps_detected[domain=documentation].proposal_status == 'provisioned'.
acceptance_criteria: schedule-index.json has weekly entry for documentation
completion_notes: All acceptance criteria verified: context_prompt.md written (1766 bytes, tailored to tracks spoke documentation+prompt-library identity); scan_state.json status=stub; registry.json entry added with department_id=knowledge; schedule-index.json weekly entry appended; ozi/scan_state.json team_coverage.gaps_detected[documentation].proposal_status=provisioned.
